title: trifolium cyathiferum
intro: Trifolium cyathiferum, also known as the Cupped Clover, is a perennial legume plant in the Fabaceae family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium cyathiferum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
